plugins.name: rails-37signals-patterns
plugins.description: Compact Rails specialists inspired by public 37signals/Basecamp practice for models, controllers, Hotwire, Kamal deployment, jobs, testing, tenancy, and related application patterns.

interface.shortDescription: Compact Rails specialists inspired by public 37signals practice.
interface.longDescription: Compact Rails specialist skills for CRUD, models, Hotwire, Kamal deployment, caching, jobs, multi-tenancy, and related 37signals-inspired application design. Community-maintained, source-grounded, and intended to be delegated from the workflow router.
defaultPrompt: Use the relevant Rails 37signals specialist skill for this focused Rails change.
Review this focused Rails area against 37signals-inspired pattern guidance.
Use the Kamal specialist to inspect this deploy/runtime change.

plugins.name: rails-37signals-workflows
plugins.description: Router-level Rails skills for implementation, refactoring, and review using 37signals-inspired conventions.

interface.shortDescription: Rails implementation, refactor, and review routers.
interface.longDescription: Router-level Rails workflow skills that inspect the app first, choose the right compact specialist skills, and report verification and residual risk using 37signals-inspired conventions.
defaultPrompt: Use Rails 37signals Workflows to implement this feature and choose the right specialists.
Use Rails 37signals Workflows to refactor this code while preserving behavior.
Use Rails 37signals Workflows to review this Rails change and report residual risk.

plugins.name: fizzy
plugins.description: CLI-first Fizzy workflows for boards, cards, comments, setup, and self-hosted management.

interface.shortDescription: Manage Fizzy from the command line with the upstream CLI only.
interface.longDescription: CLI-first Fizzy automation for boards, cards, comments, setup, and self-hosted workflows. Never falls back to curl or raw HTTP requests.
defaultPrompt: Set up the Fizzy CLI for the hosted instance.
List boards and summarize active work in Fizzy.
Manage Fizzy cards and comments from the CLI.

plugins.name: rcc
plugins.description: Focused RCC-family skills for RCC itself, robots, holotree environments, work items, Action Server packages, and CI maintenance.

interface.shortDescription: Focused RCC skills for RCC core, robots, work items, action packages, and CI maintenance.
interface.longDescription: RCC-family workflows split into focused skills for RCC CLI/source orientation, robot scaffolding and holotree environments, work item adapters, ordinary Action Server packages, and RCC-powered CI maintenance.
defaultPrompt: Choose the right RCC specialist skill for this task.
Orient me in RCC source, holotree, caches, endpoints, or templates.
Debug this robot.yaml or conda.yaml setup.
Design a local work item queue or adapter flow.
Set up RCC-powered CI maintenance safely.
